title: NoCombatElytra
description: Very simple server-sided Fabric mod that disables elytra gliding during combat.
body:
# NoCombatElytra
Very simple server-sided Fabric mod that disables elytra gliding during combat.

![Picture of a broken elytra with a Diamond Sword going through it, used as the mods icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/152657abe9ded0719c88274cb5fbddbc5e5bbbc4.png)

## Features
![Text reading "You may use your elytra in 17 seconds!"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c2a8555f98e54b89872f4d61996880b4fe662b.png)
- Configurable combat cooldown (`config/nocombatelytra.json`)
- Works with vanilla clients
- Cooldown resets on respawn and works on real-world time
